title: phlomoides regeliana
intro: Phlomoides regeliana, also known as Mongolian sage, is a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae. It is an herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems. The plant's health benefits include its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and other infections. Herbal preparations of Phlomoides regeliana include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
